rationale: The page contains a heading 'Ancient Time - Lucknow' and a map showing the 16 Mahajanapadas of India around 600 B.C. It also includes an artistic reconstruction of an ancient city. While informative as a visual aid, the textual content is limited to labels.
cleanedText:
Ancient Time - Lucknow
India, 600 B.C.: The 16 Mahajanapadas
The map illustrates the locations of the 16 Mahajanapadas and major cities during the 6th century B.C. in the Indian subcontinent.
Mahajanapadas and Cities:
- Kamboja
- Gandhara
- Kuru (Cities: Hatthipura, Indraprashta)
- Panchala
- Kosala
- Shurasena
- Matsya
- Malla
- Vrijji (City: Pataliputra)
- Kashi (City: Baranasi)
- Anga
- Magadha (City: Rajagaha)
- Vatsa
- Chetiya
- Avanti
- Assaka
Legend:
- Cities
- Rivers
- Modern Boundaries
